query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_contacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN emailVerified = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as verified_emails,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND emailVerified = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unverified_emails,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentSource = 'apollo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as apollo_contacts
FROM contacts;
